chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P No.D-1823 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 26.03.2025 Mr. Adnan Khurram Meo, advocate for the petitioner <>*<> Through this petition, petitioner seeks directions against the official respondents to keep entry in revenue record in his favour in respect of the properties left behind by Mst. Chandri S/o Jagmal Khan. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner is real son of Mst. Chandri, who being daughter of Dil Khan, inherited certain properties and after the death of Mst. Chandri the petitioner is the only living legal heir and as such entitled to inherit properties left behind by his mother Mst. Chandri. Counsel further submits that still the property exists in the name of petitioner’s grandfather Dil Khan, therefore, on approach, the petitioner was advised by the revenue authorities to seek declaration from the Court of law. Counsel avers that facing such situation the petitioner had filed Suit for declaration and mandatory injunction which, vide Judgment dated 28.10.2021 and Decree dated 03.11.2021, was decreed by the learned Senior Civil Judge Mirpurkhas, whereby petitioner (plaintiff) was declared as legal heir of Mst. Chandri, however, inspite of that the property is still existing in the name of petitioner’s grandfather Dil Khan and despite repeated approaches the revenue authorities are not changing the Foti Khata Badal in favour of the petitioner by recording such entry in Revenue Record. Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajper Assistant A.G Sindh present in Court in some other matters waives the notice and submits that by virtue of Notification dated 21.10.2024, issued by the Senior Member Board of Revenue, a Public Grievance Redressal Cell under the chairmanship of Deputy Commissioner of District concerned, has been constituted to deal with the various public complaints like in hand.

Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajper Assistant A.G Sindh present in Court in some other matters waives the notice and submits that by virtue of Notification dated 21.10.2024, issued by the Senior Member Board of Revenue, a Public Grievance Redressal Cell under the chairmanship of Deputy Commissioner of District concerned, has been constituted to deal with the various public complaints like in hand. Therefore, petitioner may approach the said Committee (Cell) for appropriate action and/or decision in accordance with law. Upon being confronted with such position, counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of the petition, leaving the petitioner at liberty to approach the respondent No.2. In view of the above, instant petition is disposed of, leaving the petitioner at liberty to approach the Public Grievance Redressal Cell, referred to above, by filing a proper application. In case the petitioner files such application, the Deputy Commissioner Mirpurkhas, being head of the Committee (Cell), shall decide the same within 30 days strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE *Sajjad*
